headline: Fifth Third Bancorp (FITB) Gets Target Boost from Morgan Stanley amid Banking Tailwinds
summary: Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ:FITB) is included among the 14 Best Dividend Stocks to Invest in Under $50. On March 2, Morgan Stanley analyst Manan Gosalia raised the firm’s price recommendation on Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ:FITB) to $67 from $60. It reiterated an Overweight rating on the shares. The firm lifted price targets across the midcap […]
